title: SZL Proof-Obligation Queue and Receipt-Scoped Formula Crosswalk
description: UNPUBLISHED CANDIDATE; DOI PENDING. A receipt-scoped, holdout-only formula crosswalk and deterministic proof-obligation queue derived from the A11oy formula-admission and bounded Brain-evidence artifacts. The package adds no proof credit, contains no raw Brain text, and admits zero rows for model training. It is not peer reviewed or independently replicated.
notes: Do not deposit until rights review, human release approval, archive verification, and readback gates pass. Replace DOI PENDING only with the identifier returned by the archive.
